**RESULT: FAIL — blocked at Step 2**

The tutorial hand widget (a floating guide overlay) permanently covers the top-left
fridge position (element 17 [406,318][549,461]) and intercepts all drag gestures.
Flutter's gesture arena gives priority to the tutorial hand's recognizer over the
ingredient's drag recognizer, regardless of touch start coordinate, gesture speed,
or drag direction. 3/4 ingredients placed; game requires all 4 to enable checkmark.

all 13 steps — that run likely generated a fridge layout with no item at top-left.
